svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Inter, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: Three ways to deploy vCluster
svg.desc: Side-by-side comparison of deploying vCluster as a pod on a Kubernetes cluster, as a standalone binary on bare metal or VMs, and as containers on Docker using vind.

g.text: Your infrastructure determines your deployment path
Runs on EKS, GKE, AKS, OpenShift,
Best for internal platforms and CI/CD.
No host cluster, no heavyweight distro.
Join remote nodes via bootstrap token.
Best for GPU, edge, and air-gapped sites.
Best for local dev, offline CI, and testing.
